# Edify Education
> India's independent online degree comparison platform. We cover 106+ UGC-DEB verified universities offering online MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA, BA, MA, B.Com, M.Com, MSc programs.
> All data is independently verified. No paid university partnerships.

## Key Facts
- All universities listed are UGC-DEB approved
- Fee data updated 2026
- Independent platform - no paid rankings
- NIRF and NAAC data from official government sources

## Programs
- Online MBA: https://edifyedu.in/programs/mba
- Online MCA: https://edifyedu.in/programs/mca
- Online BBA: https://edifyedu.in/programs/bba
- Online BCA: https://edifyedu.in/programs/bca
- Online BA: https://edifyedu.in/programs/ba
- Online B.Com: https://edifyedu.in/programs/bcom
- Online M.Com: https://edifyedu.in/programs/mcom
- Online MA: https://edifyedu.in/programs/ma
- Online MSc: https://edifyedu.in/programs/msc

## About
Edify is India's first independent research portal for UGC DEB approved online degrees.
We do not accept payments from universities. All rankings are based on official NIRF data.
Contact: hello@edifyedu.in | +91 70612 85806
